$about: Shared artifact-level conformance vectors for the A2A output-provenance field table in a2aproject/A2A#2011. Each vector is a full A2A Artifact carrying up to three flat, separable siblings in Artifact.metadata (authorship / provenance_ref? / reliability), none inside the signed fact bytes. Consolidates the published per-producer vectors so the three implementations point at one set. provenance_ref vectors are re-runnable against the live Markovian verifier; markovian-producer authorship carries an inline pubkey so the signature checks offline.

field_table.authorship: Ed25519 over the canonical fact (json-sorted-compact). Verify against metadata.verify key set, or the inline authorship.pubkey when present.
field_table.provenance_ref: OPTIONAL markovian-provenance/v1 commitment (merkle_root, anchor, verifier_url). States: ABSENT (omitted) or PRESENT. PRESENT proves existence-in-time only, never correctness.

checks: Per vector: (1) reliability MUST validate against okf-reliability-v1; (2) authorship MUST be a well-formed Ed25519 block and the sig MUST verify over the canonical fact; (3) if provenance_ref is PRESENT it MUST re-check against its verifier; (4) no sibling appears inside the signed fact bytes. A vector is 'valid' only if every present axis passes.

vectors.label: dynamicfeed.ai: single-source live reading, anchor ABSENT (honest no-anchor state)
vectors.note: From dynamicfeed/df-verify (producer dynamicfeed.ai). Anchor ABSENT honest state; authorship verifies against the producer key set at metadata.verify.

vectors.label: markovian: anchor PRESENT, live commitment, valid
vectors.note: provenance_ref is a real markovian-provenance/v1 commitment; re-checkable green at its verifier_url.

vectors.label: markovian: anchor PRESENT but not re-checkable, invalid
vectors.note: authorship and reliability are well-formed; the vector is invalid solely because provenance_ref.merkle_root does not resolve at its verifier (existence-in-time cannot be confirmed).
